title: Plan executor
description: Runs terraform plan for a Terraform project through @pagopa/dx-tasks

projectRoot.description: Terraform project root used as the module path

out.description: Optional path passed to terraform plan -out

refresh.description: Whether to refresh state before planning

report.description: Whether to write a dx-tasks JSON report of the plan output

sensitiveKeys.description: Terraform output keys whose values must be redacted

verbose.description: Whether to print the full terraform plan output
